creator: pgollucci@gmail.com
text:
[05:46 AM](0)pgollucci@frieza.p6m7g8.net j0 h509 c1010
/pr/devel/libee/work/libee-0.3.2>
grep -R ctx.h  * |grep src/json_enc.i
src/json_enc.i:# 1 "../include/libee/ctx.h" 1
src/json_enc.i:# 60 "../include/libee/ctx.h"
src/json_enc.i:# 89 "../include/libee/ctx.h"
src/json_enc.i:# 101 "../include/libee/ctx.h"
src/json_enc.i:# 114 "../include/libee/ctx.h"
src/json_enc.i:# 129 "../include/libee/ctx.h"
src/json_enc.i:# 144 "../include/libee/ctx.h"
src/json_enc.i:# 156 "../include/libee/ctx.h"
src/json_enc.i:# 170 "../include/libee/ctx.h"
src/json_enc.i:# 211 "../include/libee/ctx.h"
src/json_enc.i:# 1 "../include/libee/ctx.h" 1

It *is* included just fine.  I'm quite perplexed now.  I misread you're
uname earlier for -PRERELEASE.



On 02/07/12 03:08, Kenyon Ralph wrote:
> On 2012-02-07T02:00:34+0000, pgollucci@FreeBSD.org wrote:
>> Synopsis: devel/libee 0.3.2 fails to build due to error: 'EE_CTX_FLAG_INCLUDE_FLAT_TAGS' undeclared
>>
>> State-Changed-From-To: open->closed
>> State-Changed-By: pgollucci
>> State-Changed-When: Tue Feb 7 02:00:34 UTC 2012
>> State-Changed-Why: 
>> this is a local problem empty your /etc/make.conf and update to
>> 9.0-RELEASE,
>> http://people.freebsd.org/~pgollucci/FreeBSD/logs/9-CURRENT-amd64/libee-0.3.2.log
> 
> I'm running stable/9, as I was when I made the original report. The
> system is now at r230760. The build still fails with the same error
> with an empty /etc/make.conf.
> 
> If I edit json_enc.c and manually change EE_CTX_FLAG_INCLUDE_FLAT_TAGS
> to 2, which is what it's defined to be, then the build completes
> successfully. It's very strange, because it seems like ctx.h should be
> included just fine.
> 
>> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=164598
>
